summary: Frontend-only validation of /solutions/fintech-infrastructure page. All 18 sections render with correct data-testids and exact card/row counts per BRD. Hero headline, wallet/card mockups, DEXA disclaimers, scenario action chips, and Final CTA buttons all verified. Other routes (/, /solutions, /solutions/healthcare-infrastructure, /solutions/insurance-infrastructure) return 200 and load. Zero JS page errors observed.
critical_code_review_comments: FintechInfrastructure.jsx is 345 lines and dense (many sections written in a single line). Consider splitting each section component into its own file under pages/solutions/fintech/sections/ for maintainability and to mirror typical component-per-file patterns. Not a functional bug.

DexaScenarios outer container uses .space-y-6 selector for child counting; relying on Tailwind utility classes for testing is brittle. Consider adding data-testid on each scenario item (e.g., fin-dexa-scenario-{i}) to make automated testing more robust against class refactors.
WalletSection and CardSection mockups have hard-coded balances and card number string. Currently fine for marketing, but if these need i18n/locale formatting later, encapsulate in data file.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Fintech Infrastructure page passes all BRD checks at iteration 6. Verified counts: hero=12, problem=12, stack=13, rails-visual=13, stakeholders=10, journeys=7, modules=22, healthcare=12, insurance=12, dexa_roles=5, dexa_scenarios=6, architecture=7 (L1..L7), deployment=10, use-cases=18, outcomes=14. Hero headline matches required string exactly. Wallet shows PKR 45,000 and Card shows '**** **** **** 4291'. DEXA section contains both 'does not approve payments independently' and 'does not replace finance teams'. DEXA scenarios render action chips (18 total across 6 scenarios). Final CTA has both 'Build Fintech Infrastructure' and 'Talk to Mentor Global'. Sibling routes /, /solutions, /solutions/healthcare-infrastructure, /solutions/insurance-infrastructure all return HTTP 200 and load with content. No console/page errors.
